name: Beef Vindaloo
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Beef chuck, cut into 1-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend garlic and vinegar into a smooth paste.
2. Remove tops and bottoms of chiles; discard seeds.
3. In a bowl, mix cumin seeds, turmeric, mustard, ginger, salt, and sugar.
4. Add the blended mixture to the blender jar.
5. Squeeze lemon juice into the blender; discard pips, chop pulp and add.
6. Combine the marinade with beef in a bowl; marinate for 2 hours (avoid spills).
7. Finely slice onion.
8. Heat clarified butter in a skillet over medium heat; cook onions until opaque.
9. Add bay leaves and cloves to the pan.
10. Using a slotted spoon, transfer meat from marinade into the pan with onions.
11. Increase heat for quick sealing of meat.
12. Return sealed meat to marinade; cover tightly.
13. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 1 hour.
14. Add tomato paste; stir thoroughly into meat mixture.
15. Cook on low heat for another 30 minutes until tender.
16. Serve hot, garnished with lime cordial if desired.
This dish is very spicy! Enjoy it with plain boiled or steamed long grain rice.
